title: The security guard at my building
summary: Describe the security guard who works at the entrance of your building.
topic: The security guard at my building
prompt: Write 6–8 short sentences about the security guard at your building. Describe what he does each day, how he greets people, and what you talk about. Use present simple.
hintStarters: There is a security guard at my building. His name is…
He sits at the front desk and…
When I come home, he always…
sampleText: There is a security guard at my building in Mexico City. His name is Don Carlos. He sits at the front desk near the entrance. He wears a dark blue uniform and a small badge with his name. He works from two o'clock in the afternoon until midnight. When I come home, he always says hello and opens the door for me. He knows the people who live here and he checks every visitor. There is a small radio on his desk, and he listens to football news in the evening. On rainy days, he lends an umbrella to people who forget theirs. We sometimes talk about the weather or his grandchildren. He has six grandchildren and he shows me photos on his phone. I like him because he is kind and patient. The building feels safe because Don Carlos is there. I think he does an important job that many people do not see.

sampleGrammarNotes.title: Time phrases with 'from … until …'
sampleGrammarNotes.bodyVi: Dùng 'from ... until ...' để nói khoảng thời gian: 'He works from two o'clock in the afternoon until midnight'.
sampleGrammarNotes.bodyEn: Use 'from ... until ...' for a period of time: 'He works from two o'clock in the afternoon until midnight'.

sampleGrammarNotes.title: Possessive adjectives
sampleGrammarNotes.bodyVi: 'his', 'her', 'their' dùng trước danh từ để chỉ sở hữu: 'his name', 'his desk', 'his phone', 'people who forget theirs'.
sampleGrammarNotes.bodyEn: 'his', 'her', 'their' go before a noun to show ownership: 'his name', 'his desk', 'his phone', 'people who forget theirs'.

sampleTranslationVi: Có một người bảo vệ ở tòa nhà của tôi tại Mexico City. Tên ông là Don Carlos. Ông ngồi ở bàn lễ tân gần lối vào. Ông mặc đồng phục màu xanh đậm và đeo một phù hiệu nhỏ có tên. Ông làm việc từ hai giờ chiều đến nửa đêm. Khi tôi về nhà, ông luôn chào và mở cửa cho tôi. Ông biết những người sống ở đây và kiểm tra mọi khách. Trên bàn có một cái đài nhỏ, và buổi tối ông nghe tin bóng đá. Vào những ngày mưa, ông cho người quên ô mượn ô. Đôi khi chúng tôi nói chuyện về thời tiết hoặc về các cháu của ông. Ông có sáu đứa cháu và ông cho tôi xem ảnh trên điện thoại. Tôi thích ông vì ông tử tế và kiên nhẫn. Tòa nhà có cảm giác an toàn vì có Don Carlos ở đó. Tôi nghĩ ông làm một công việc quan trọng mà nhiều người không thấy.

options: At the front desk of a building
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'He sits at the front desk near the entrance' of the writer's building.
mcQuestions.hint: Find his workplace in the building.

mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'He wears a dark blue uniform'.
mcQuestions.hint: Look at the colour of his clothes.

mcQuestions.prompt: What time does he start work?
options: At two o'clock in the morning
At two o'clock in the afternoon
At six o'clock in the evening
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'He works from two o'clock in the afternoon until midnight'.
mcQuestions.hint: Look for the time of day his shift begins.

mcQuestions.prompt: What does he do when the writer comes home?
options: He says hello and opens the door
He calls the writer a taxi
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'he always says hello and opens the door for me'.
mcQuestions.hint: Look at his greeting when the writer returns.

mcQuestions.prompt: What does he listen to on the radio?
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'he listens to football news in the evening'.
mcQuestions.hint: Look at what is on the radio in the evening.

mcQuestions.prompt: What does he do on rainy days?
options: He lends an umbrella to people who forget theirs
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'On rainy days, he lends an umbrella to people who forget theirs'.

mcQuestions.prompt: How many grandchildren does Don Carlos have?
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'He has six grandchildren'.

options: He works from two o'clock until midnight.
He works from two o'clock and midnight.
He works in two o'clock until midnight.
He works from midnight until two o'clock in the afternoon.
mcQuestions.explanation: The pattern 'from + start time + until + end time' shows the working hours correctly.
mcQuestions.hint: Look for the right structure that matches the text.

mcQuestions.prompt: Which possessive adjective is correct? '___ name is Don Carlos.'
mcQuestions.explanation: Possessive adjective for a man: 'his name'.
mcQuestions.hint: Use the word that means 'belonging to him'.

mcQuestions.prompt: Why does the writer think the building feels safe?
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'The building feels safe because Don Carlos is there'.

criticalThinkingQuestion: Why do we often ignore the people who keep us safe at work or at home? What changes when we learn their names?
